raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Tu darbojees uṣ tawn
garru Zettu/ un ne fakfi: Es mit-
teschobś/ tu effi zaur tawn Kob-
fu to Dsihwibu atraddufi / ta-
pehz tu ne tohpi wahja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Bet par ko effi ku tik bai-
liga un bihstees? kur tu tomehr
efi mellojust/ un ne effi mannis
peeminnejft/ tu ne effi manni ta-
wā Sirdi nehmusi/ Woj tad es
muhſcham kluflu zeetifchu/ ka tu
manntś ne bihstees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Es darrifchnu tawu Taif-
nibu finnainu/ un tawnś Dar-
buś/ ka tee tew ne palihdfehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Kad tu brehkeft/ tad lai tee
tewi palihds/fo tu effi fapulzejft;
Bet tas Wehjſch aisweddihs
tohś wiffus / un ta Meteetiba
tohś atjeme. Bet kas us man-
ni palaischahs/ tas eemantohs to
Seimmi / un turrehs mannu
fwehtu Kalnu par eemantojamu
Teesu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Un wiꞥſch fazzihś : Lih-
dsinajeet/ lihdsinajeet/ padarrajt
to Zettu / atjemmet tahs Pee-
daundſifchanag no ta Zetta man-
nu Lauschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Jo ta fakka tas Augstajs
un Pa-augstinahts / kas muh-
schigt dsihivo/ un ka Wahrds
fivehtś irr/ es dsihwoju Augstibā
un fivehtā Weetā/ un pee ta/
kam fagraufts un pasenmohts
Gars irraid/ ka es dsihwu dar-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Jo es ne bahrschohs mu-
schigt / neds dustmofchohs b-
Galla/ jo zittadi winna * Ga-
isfamiftu/ kad es winnu ne u-
luhkon.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Es biju apskaitees pahr t-
Netaisnibu winno Negausfibus
* un fittu tohs / un aptlehpo-
un apskaitohs/ tatschu tee atkat-
pufschees nogahje us sawu Sird-
Zettu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Es eerundsiju winno Zek-
tus/ un dseediuuju tohs / un ee-
waddiju tohs/ un dewu teem-
Eepreezinaschann / kas pahr to-
behdajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Es raddischu Augkus to-
Luhipu/ Meers / Meers laid tru-
teem/ kas tahfu un kas tuwu trr-
fakka tas KUNGS: Un es tohs-
dseedinaschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Bet tee Besdeewigee irr-
ka ta eekustinata Juhra/ kas ne-
warr nostahtees / un winnas-
Wilxi isinett Duhnag un Dub-
tus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Teem Besdeewigeeem ne-
irr Meers/ fakka mans Deews.
Ta LVIII. Nodalla.
Mahza tohs Praweechus un Basuizas-Kun-
gus/ ka teem buhs sawu Balſi pazelt ka Ba-
juni : 1. Untobs neleefschus Gawenus : 2/6.
Ka arri to Neſwehtiſchanu tahs Gwehdees-
nas apraht : 13.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
